name: SARATOGA INVESTMENT CORP.
summary: Saratoga Investment Corp. is a specialty finance company providing customized financing solutions to U.S. middle-market businesses (companies with EBITDA of $2M–$50M). It primarily invests in senior and unitranche leveraged loans, mezzanine debt, and equity via direct lending and loan syndication. As of February 28, 2025, it held $1,191.5M in total assets across 48 portfolio companies, with portfolio composition of 88.7% first lien term loans, managed externally by Saratoga Investment Advisors, LLC.

products.name: Senior/Unitranche Leveraged Loans
products.description: First lien senior secured term loans to U.S. middle-market companies for ownership changes, acquisitions, recapitalizations, and growth.

products.name: Mezzanine Debt
products.description: Unsecured subordinated debt investments in middle-market companies to generate current income and capital appreciation.

products.name: Equity Investments
products.description: Equity stakes in private U.S. middle-market companies as part of broader financing solutions.

products.name: Saratoga Investment Corp. CLO 2013-1, Ltd.
products.description: Collateralized loan obligation fund holding $527.1M in senior secured first lien term loans; Saratoga holds subordinated notes.

products.name: Saratoga Senior Loan Fund I JV LLC (SLF JV)
products.description: Joint venture with fair value of $19.6M as of February 28, 2025.

products.name: Saratoga Investment Corp. Senior Loan Fund 2022-1, Ltd.
products.description: Structured finance vehicle; Saratoga holds Class E Note with fair value of $12.3M as of February 28, 2025.

partnerships.description: External investment manager and advisor, affiliated with Saratoga Partners, a middle-market private equity firm.
Middle-market private equity firm affiliated with external manager Saratoga Investment Advisors, LLC.
